mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relation_event_outbox(event_id, event_type, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE event_id = event_id
mapper.select: SELECT event_id AS eventId, event_type AS eventType, payload, status, retry_count AS retryCount, next_retry_time AS nextRetryTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM relation_event_outbox WHERE status = #{status} AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= #{now}) ORDER BY update_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE relation_event_outbox SET status = 'DONE', update_time = NOW() WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
UPDATE relation_event_outbox SET status = 'FAIL', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
